backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functions or state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a required update to Services.tsx and listing related components and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-like file containing prewritten summaries for various frontend components and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining extensive CSS variables for light/dark themes and applying global background and text styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting metadata and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component assembling all page sections into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: Contact form with validation, success state, and controlled inputs for name, email, and message.
frontend/src/components/sections/About.t: About section displaying the company overview and three feature cards with icons.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section showing office details and phone/email links alongside the contact form.
Footer with branding, quick links, social icons, and attribution including dynamic year and app identifier.
frontend/src/components/sections/Hero.ts: Hero section with headline, description, CTAs, and an image, including smooth scroll handlers.
Responsive navbar with smooth-scrolling links and mobile sheet menu.
Photo upload and management UI with validation, storage persistence, and error handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Services grid listing consulting categories with icons and subcategory items.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays client testimonials in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Authentication context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, state, and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/usePersistedPhotos.ts: Provides a hook to load, save, add, remove, and clear photo items in localStorage with size checks and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file exporting nothing because no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, and global accessibility and layout rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider and loads global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, radius, shadows, fonts, animations, and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including version, issues, and lists of existing and new feature requests.
